name: Divine Realm: Aequor Mastery
descriptionTemplate: Each point of Realm Mastery increases {Divine Realm: Tranquil Sea} Shield Generation by 0.025% Max HP and increases {Divine Realm: Raging Waves} {Tentacle DMG} by 0.025%. This effect is doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners.
